title: Senior Financial Analyst - LIC - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - LIC - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Senior Financial Analyst with drive and ambition, LIC in Hyderabad is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About LIC:
LIC is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Referral bonus program
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with LIC!
